since_last: 90% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 90% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.76% · Gold -0.72% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 90% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.06%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.06%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +4.23%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +4.23%, LRCX +4.19%, AMAT +3.96%, ORCL +3.62%, AVAV +3.28%. Laggards: PUBM -0.88%, AES -0.75%, D -0.33%, LSCC -0.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.35% at $156.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
